title: geum rivale f. alpinum
intro: Geum rivale f. alpinum, also known as alpine avens, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Geum rivale f. alpinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Geum rivale f. alpinum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to respiratory issues.
